timeSpent.label: Networking / CNI questions — most still resolve in < 1h
Storage — PV reclaim and CSI driver behavior

incidents.action: Pinned ingress version; nightly canary added

incidents.summary: etcd leader election storm — Dallas DC

incidents.action: Pull-through cache deployed to all clusters
Webhook concurrency raised; queue alerts added

incidentsPattern: Pattern: three of the four P1s traced to capacity / throughput limits at infrastructure boundaries. Shift coverage and a Q4 runbook review will harden these — see next-quarter goals.

wins.headline: Freight platform live on k0rdent
wins.body: 187 new workloads migrated. Cutover took 6 hours against a 12-hour window. Zero rollback events in the four weeks since.

wins.headline: Dallas DC online ahead of plan
wins.body: Three new MKE clusters bootstrapped in 18 days. Joint runbook reduced bring-up time by ~40% vs. the EU-WEST build last year.

wins.headline: CTO referenced us at KubeCon EU
wins.body: Jordan Patel's session named MKE specifically in his platform-team talk track. Two inbound leads from the recording.

risks.title: P1 MTTR trending wrong
risks.body: Two of four P1s exceeded the 3h target. Root cause traces to APAC-hour coverage gap.

risks.title: k0rdent UK expansion slip
risks.body: Originally Q3, deferred to Q4 pending data-residency review on Vertex side.

risks.title: MKE 3.7 upgrade window
risks.body: 3.6 reaches EOL Feb 2027 — three weeks before renewal. Upgrade plan needed by November.

mirantisRoadmap.title: k0rdent multi-region GA
mirantisRoadmap.body: Cross-region failover · relevant to EU-WEST + Dallas

customerRoadmap.title: UK data-residency build
customerRoadmap.body: k0rdent Enterprise rollout to UK envs after DPIA closes. Mirantis to support cutover plan.

customerRoadmap.title: Last-mile platform v2
customerRoadmap.body: Real-time routing service. ~600 new workloads expected; multi-region failover requirement aligns with k0rdent multi-region GA.

customerRoadmap.title: ML platform consolidation
customerRoadmap.body: Consolidate three internal ML teams onto a shared inference platform. Mirantis to advise on GPU node topology.

training.deliveredNote: CNI session correlated with a 31% drop in networking-related tickets in the following 6 weeks.
training.plannedNote: Bundled in current contract — no additional spend.

execSummaryTakeaways.label: 01 · MOMENTUM
execSummaryTakeaways.headline: Usage up across the board.
execSummaryTakeaways.body: 14 clusters (+3), 312 nodes, 1,847 workloads (+412). Dallas DC online May 18; freight-tracking platform live in production.

execSummaryTakeaways.label: 02 · WATCH
execSummaryTakeaways.headline: Support response softened.
execSummaryTakeaways.body: 96% SLA met (down 2pp). Two P1s exceeded MTTR target; RCAs closed June 12 with shift-coverage changes in flight.

execSummaryTakeaways.label: 03 · DECIDE
execSummaryTakeaways.headline: k0rdent expansion needs a date.
execSummaryTakeaways.body: Deferred from Q3 to Q4. Renewal in March 2027 — we'd like a commitment by Q4 close to model into the renewal proposal.

fromUs.title: Sign off on k0rdent UK plan by Oct 15
Confirm Q4 renewal sponsor
fromUs.body: So our paper goes to the right exec the first time.

fromYou.title: APAC-hour engineer in place by Sep 30
fromYou.body: Lifts P1 MTTR back under 3h. Closes Risk 01.

fromYou.title: MKE 3.7 upgrade runbook draft by Sep 1
Last-mile platform architecture review
fromYou.body: Joint design session before Q1 work starts.

previousActions.commitment: Bring Dallas DC online with MKE
Cut P1 MTTR from 4.2h to under 3h
k0rdent Enterprise expansion to UK envs
